title: First $1500: Neon Postmortem
description: Race to bank your first $1500 by tapping the right neon revenue orbs before they fade and dodging the costly mistakes that suddenly flip the board.

howToPlayJson.title: First $1500: Neon Postmortem
howToPlayJson.objective: Reach exactly $1500 as fast as possible by tapping glowing money orbs marked as what worked, while avoiding what didn't, refunds, and over-target penalties.

controls.input: Tap a glowing orb before its ring closes
controls.outcome: Adds its dollar value to your total and builds combo

controls.input: Do not tap red or cracked orbs
controls.outcome: Avoids losing combo or taking a penalty

controls.input: Quickly switch targets when the screen banner and chime announce a rule flip
controls.outcome: Lets you exploit the current bonus rule before it expires

steps: Neon orbs drift in from screen edges with large, readable dollar values like $5, $15, $50 and clear color labels: WORKED or DIDN'T.
You tap only the active profitable set before each orb's countdown ring empties; every correct tap raises your combo multiplier.
Every few seconds, a loud cue and full-screen banner trigger a Postmortem Flip: either WORKED orbs pay double, DIDN'T orbs temporarily turnm
howToPlayJson.scoring: Score is based on speed to hit $1500, final combo multiplier, and leftover lives. Hitting profitable orbs adds their value; missing them breaks combo. Tapping a bad orb subtracts money and one life. Going over $1500 by $
tips: Watch the top banner, not just the orbs; the active rule changes often and is always telegraphed early.
Small fast orbs are safer for keeping combo alive, but larger values are how you finish a run.
If you are close to $1500, stop chasing big payouts and snipe exact-value orbs to avoid busting.
